name: agent:fixable
description: Agent has analyzed this and can auto-fix safely

name: agent:in-progress
description: Agent is actively working on this item

name: agent:pr
description: PR created by the automation loop - eligible for analyzer review

name: agent:blocked
description: Agent stopped - human intervention required (includes escalation)

name: agent:queued
description: Queued behind fan-out ceiling - not released automatically; must be re-triaged

name: analyzer:blocked
description: One or more analyzers found blocking issues in this PR

name: human:ready-for-review
description: All analyzers passed - PR is ready for human review and merge

name: risk:low
description: Low-risk: formatting, typos, doc updates, dependency bumps, safe refactors

name: risk:high
description: High-risk: auth, payments, data migrations, security, PII

name: report
description: Informational output only - automation must not act on this

name: no-agent
description: Opt this issue out of all Set it Free automation
